L1.area: Activity module external web service API layer

L2.description: An SQL injection vulnerability exists where a user-controlled sort order parameter passed through a web service API is directly incorporated into database queries without proper validation or sanitization, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary SQL commands.

L3.area: H5P activity module external web service endpoints
L3.description: An SQL injection vulnerability exists where a user-controlled sort order parameter passed through the H5P activity web service API is directly incorporated into database queries without proper validation or sanitization, allowing a remote attacker to execute arbitrary SQL commands when fetching user attempt data.

ground_truth.reason: The h5p activity external web service accepts a sort order parameter and passes it directly into SQL queries without validation, enabling SQL injection by remote attackers.
